docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SAWTELLE,KATERINA HEARING SET FOR APR-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAWTELLE,KATERINA CASE SETTLED. DEFENDANT WROTE $204.75 CHECK IN COURT AND GAVE TO PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MING,GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAWTELLE,KATERINA $517.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $542.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
